resources.string: Please try again in a moment.
No connection. Check your network and try again.
Login could not be verified. Please try again.
We couldn\'t complete sign-in. Please try again.
This account has been disabled. Contact BetterTrack support.
BetterTrack App is for personal accounts only.
Sign-in was cancelled. Please try again.
For security, finish changing your password in BetterTrack on the web, then come back and sign in again.
This signs you out and removes this account\'s data from the device.
Your holdings, cash and net worth appear here.
Search assets and build watchlists here.
Friends, shared portfolios and chat live here.
Compose conglomerates and plan budgets here.
Placeholder — this screen arrives in a later step.
Record your first buy and this portfolio\u2019s value, performance and allocation appear here.
A portfolio tracks your holdings, cash and performance.
Not enough history to draw yet
\u201c%1$s\u201d moves to Archived. You can restore it any time.
Buys and sells you record appear here.
No transactions for this holding yet.
This position is no longer in the portfolio.
Asset can\'t be changed on an edit
No held assets yet. Buying new assets arrives with Search.
Searching all assets arrives with Search.
Type to search stocks, ETFs, crypto and more.
Date and price stay linked — set either to fill the other.
Not seen at that price in available history — date unchanged.
On %1$s this wallet held only %2$s — the %3$s will be deducted from your cash now, as if bought today. The buy keeps its %1$s date.
More than you hold (%1$s %2$s) — BetterTrack validates on sync
Fix the values and save — it retries as the same entry.
Editing or deleting an already-synced transaction works online only.
This removes the transaction from BetterTrack. Holdings and cash are recalculated.
This entry hasn\'t reached BetterTrack yet. Discarding removes it from the sync queue.
Record a transaction for this asset
Everything you recorded has reached BetterTrack.
Waiting for a connection — syncs automatically.
“%1$s” moves to Archived. Its balance must be zero.
Deposits, withdrawals and transfers appear here.
This removes the asset and its value history from BetterTrack.
Track things like a watch collection, real estate or a private loan.
Record two values to draw the history
Records the value as of the selected date. It replaces any value already set for that day.
Removes this dated value from the history.
Draw a straight line between value marks instead of holding each value until the next.
Search by name or symbol — stocks, ETFs, crypto and more.
Try a different name or symbol.
Search needs a connection. Reconnect to look up assets.
No price history for this range.
Asset pages need a connection. Reconnect to see live prices.
Version %1$s is ready to install from GitHub.
Delete “%1$s”? Its assets are removed from this list.
Add stocks, ETFs or crypto to follow their prices here.
Conglomerates need a connection. Reconnect to view them.
Build a weighted basket of assets, backtest it, and buy it into a portfolio.
Delete this conglomerate? This can\'t be undone.
Keep the app in portrait. Turn off to follow your device\'s rotation.
See what\'s new in this version
Switch between your portfolios straight from the top bar, next to the logo.
Your portfolio graph now fills the screen edge to edge, like a hero image.
Balances glide into place instead of jumping as prices move.
Keep the app in portrait, or let it rotate with your phone.
The conglomerate budget calculator now lets you choose either.
Creating and updating your own assets is quicker and clearer.
Update prompts, and this page, now explain what each version brings.
Pick a date to fill that day\'s price, or type a price to find the day it traded there.
Amount fields select everything on tap, so you can retype in an instant.
Recording an older purchase now warns you instead of blocking it.
Tap a friend to see their profile and everything they share with you.
See who shares with you, then open each person\'s portfolios and watchlists.
Share with certain friends, all friends, or anyone through a private link you can revoke anytime.
Create as many watchlists as you like and give each one a name.
Chat with friends right inside BetterTrack — rolling out now.
Update your account password without leaving the app.
Add a second step at login to keep your account safer.
See where you\'re signed in and sign out other devices.
Close your account and remove your data whenever you choose.
Switch BetterTrack between English and German in Settings.
Protect BetterTrack with a PIN, on launch or after time away.
Use your fingerprint or face instead of typing your PIN.
Unlock with the same PIN as your BetterTrack account — no new one to remember.
Net worth, holdings and allocation, all at a glance.
Buy and sell anytime — your changes sync as soon as you\'re back online.
Explore assets, build watchlists and put conglomerates together in one place.
Friend requests, shares and alerts will show up here.
Get alerts even when the app is closed.
In-app and email preferences sync with the web when available. Push and Mute are saved on this device.
Tap to manage channels in system settings.
Allow notifications to get alerts on this device.
When a friend shares a portfolio
When an asset hits your target
Require a PIN or biometrics to open the app
Managed by your BetterTrack account — change it on the web
Use fingerprint or face to unlock
Set up a fingerprint in Android settings to enable
Biometric unlock isn\'t available on this device
The app lock is stored only on this device and is separate from your BetterTrack account password. Forgetting the PIN signs you out.
Your PIN will be removed and the app will no longer ask to unlock.
To reset it we\'ll sign you out and clear this device\'s local data. You can set a new PIN after signing in again.
Use your fingerprint or face to unlock
Use 4 to 6 digits. This PIN is stored only on this device.
How do you want to unlock?
Either way, your PIN is stored only on this device.
A new 4–6 digit PIN just for opening this app
The same 4-digit PIN as your BetterTrack account
Use the same 4-digit PIN as your BetterTrack account. We check it once, then keep only a locked copy of it on this device.
Connect to the internet to verify your BetterTrack PIN
Couldn\'t verify right now. Please try again
Your account doesn\'t have a web PIN set yet. Create a device PIN for this app instead, or set one on the BetterTrack website first.
Use your fingerprint or face to unlock the app, with your PIN as a fallback.
Permanently delete your account and data
%1$d more taps to unlock developer options
For your security, enter your current password, then choose a new one.
Choose a password different from your current one.
Add a second step at login
Add a second step at login for extra security. Use an authenticator app, email codes, or both.
Use an app like Google Authenticator or 1Password
Setup started — finish to turn it on
Get a code by email at login
We sent a code to your email. Enter it below to turn on email codes.
Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
Enter a current 6-digit code or a recovery code to turn it off.
Store these somewhere safe. Each code works once. You won\'t see them again.
These are the places you\'re signed in to BetterTrack — on the web and other devices. Sign out any you don\'t recognise.
%1$s will be signed out of BetterTrack.
This signs you out of BetterTrack on the web and every other device. This app stays signed in.
This app isn\'t listed here — it signs in with a secure token, not a web session.
Choose the language for the app. Money and dates follow the same setting.
Deleting your account permanently removes your portfolios, transactions, cash, custom assets, watchlists, conglomerates and social data. This can\'t be reversed.
Enter your password to confirm it\'s you.
Account deletion is disabled in this build for safety. In the release app this permanently deletes your account.
This permanently deletes your account and all its data. This can\'t be undone.
Get notified when an asset reaches your target price or moves by a set percentage.
Price alerts need a connection to load.
Keeps alerting after it triggers, with a 24-hour cooldown.
